# InfoGiph — Site Overview

InfoGiph transforms your text into stunning, interactive animated infographics in seconds. Paste or import your content — notes, blogs, wikis, presentations, or documents — and InfoGiph generates the most relevant visual format. Every output is fully editable so you can adjust content and style to maximize impact. A free tier lets you try it instantly; paid plans unlock higher usage for teams.

## Background
We believe sharing ideas visually should be effortless. InfoGiph's philosophy is "AI generates, you refine": AI creates a polished first draft, then you customize colors, fonts, layout, and animations. The platform supports multiple content types — from simple notes to full presentations — making it versatile for marketing, education, internal comms, and social media.

## Content Sections
### [Product & Canvas](https://www.infogiph.com/canvas)
The interactive canvas where you create and edit infographics. Supports text-to-visual generation, drag-and-drop editing, multiple export formats, and a personal workspace for managing your creations.

### [Blog & Tutorials](https://www.infogiph.com/blog)
Practical guides on infographic design, visual storytelling tips, and tutorials for getting the most out of InfoGiph.

### [Pricing](https://www.infogiph.com/pricing)
Free tier with daily usage, plus paid plans for teams needing higher volume.

### [Policies & Compliance](https://www.infogiph.com/privacy)
Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, and Cookie Policy — clear on data use and retention.

## User Value
- Save time: text becomes animated infographics in seconds, no design skills needed.
- Stay editable: customize colors, fonts, layout, and animations to match your brand.
- Multiple formats: create notes, blog visuals, presentations, documents, and social media content.
- Share easily: export in multiple formats for docs, decks, and social platforms.
- Scale affordably: free daily usage to try; paid plans for teams.

## Latest Content
### [InfoGiph Blog](https://www.infogiph.com/blog)
Tips, tutorials, and inspiration for creating effective visual content with InfoGiph.
